title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Toki, Shutenmaru, Unknown person #11, Garp as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who in the world would do something like this...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is there some chump out there pretending to be a hero that gives people food?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What a short- lived act of heroin.

dialogue.text: AJAMAYAMA THIEVES- LEADER SUUTE NAN AQUIN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was rendered moot as soon as we came to steal this food.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there are no longer any samural left to protect these pitiful weak-lings.

dialogue.text: This country no longer has any real men...

dialogue.text: That strong samura! Can follow any- more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The Wano Country's Days are numbered....!!

dialogue.text: You will witness only the cruel truth.

dialogue.text: Nine Samurai will definitely... Carry out Lord Oden's wishes....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
